title: 🔥 Campaign Management Trainee
description:
🚀 Who We Are


We’re not your typical company—we’re a team of dream-chasers, go-getters, and innovators. At Innovation Organization, we run campaigns that don’t just sell, they make waves. From buzzing events to powerful marketing strategies, we’re here to take brands to the next level—and we want YOU to be part of it.


⚡ What You’ll Be Doing

Be at the frontlines of sales & marketing campaigns – from events to roadshows to door to door

Brainstorm, plan, and execute creative campaigns that turn heads

Work with a driven, energetic team that pushes you to grow every single day

Build skills in communication, leadership, and strategy that’ll set you up for success

Have fun while learning—because we believe growth should be exciting


💥 What’s In It For You

Unlimited growth potential – your career progression is in your hands

Travel opportunities (local & overseas) to broaden your horizons 🌍

Coaching & mentorship from leaders who’ve been where you are now

A vibrant, supportive culture that feels less like work and more like family

A career where your hard work = real rewards


🎯 Who We’re Looking For

- Fresh grads / career starters with BIG ambitions

- Hungry to learn, eager to grow, and not afraid of challenges

- Outgoing, energetic, and loves connecting with people

- Team players with a “let’s win together” mindset

- No experience? No problem. We’ll train you from scratch 💪


📍 Location

Central Singapore (walking distance to MRT 🚇)


💎 Why Join Us?

Because this isn’t just another 9–6 job. It’s your shot at building a career full of growth, excitement, and endless opportunities. If you’re ready to level up your game and take charge of your future—this is YOUR moment.


👉 Apply now Mak - WhatsApp 81714219!
Your journey starts here.

postedCompany.description:
Our company specializes in offering face-to-face marketing services to organizations, providing them with a powerful way to connect with potential buyers.

In today's world, where digital communications dominate, we recognize that face-to-face sales are a crucial part of the marketing mix, providing a personalized and memorable experience for customers. Our services help our clients to introduce, advertise, sell and activate their products or brand through face-to-face marketing, enabling them to stand out in a crowded market and connect with customers in a more impactful way.

At our company, we believe that building strong relationships with our clients is key to providing exceptional service. We take the time to understand our clients' needs and become experts in their business and brand, enabling us to provide tailored marketing solutions that meet their goals.

Our clients come from a diverse range of industries, including telecommunications, pay TV, broadband, insurance, consumer products, transport, financial services, technology, fundraising, lifestyle, and energy, and we bring a wealth of experience and knowledge to each project.
postedCompany.name: STARSEARCH
